subject: A gaunt, bald vampire wizard hunched in shadow, peering with rapt focus into a small bowl or vessel cupped in their hands — reading entrails or divining from blood
description: A lean, hairless figure in dark robes hunches forward in near-total darkness, face lit only by a faint warm glow rising from a small bowl or vessel cradled in their hands. The face is sharp and skeletal, with a long pointed nose, deep eye sockets, and an expression of focused, almost hungry concentration. The figure's skin reads pale and drained, hands long and bony. The lighting is severe chiaroscuro — most of the body dissolves into pitch black, with a single warm orange-red light source from the bowl picking out the face, throat, and hands. The mood is occult, intimate, and grim — divination as a private sacrament, not spectacle.
foreground: robed figure hunched over a glowing bowl, hands cupped around the light source
background: near-total black void with faint suggestions of an interior space
emotion: intense focus, hungry concentration, private absorption
